case_title: GALDAMEZ, JAIME VS SONY CORPORATION OF AMERICA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GALDAMEZ, JAIME AS TO DEFENDANT SONY CORPORATION OF AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2000 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAILING TO SONY CORP. RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-27-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-08-2001 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR DEFENDANT TO APPEAR. DEFENDANT'S CLAIMS ADJUSTER CANNOT APPEAR FOR DEFENDANT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALDAMEZ, JAIME IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SONY CORPORATION OF AMERICA DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE TO PLTF SUING THE PROPER DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
